text: Hello, good morning. This is our Darwin C robotic operation creator and today I will demonstrate you some important learning skill. You have to take a grape and just draw a line on the grape with one sketch pen and then with the Darwin C one scissors and one micro needle holder you can stabilize the grape and start cutting with articulating the micro scissors. My procedures of endo wrist instrument as you know it can move in any direction without rumor and with extreme precision. You can keep to the ultra fine mode.

The Da Vinci robotic system is used to precisely cut along marked lines on the grape's skin using micro scissors, while a micro needle holder stabilizes the grape. The ultra-fine mode allows for sharp, precise incisions, demonstrating the system's capability for delicate surgical tasks.

Using two micro-dental holders, the surgeon stabilizes the grape with one holder while peeling off the skin smoothly with the other, demonstrating the precision and tremor-free capabilities of the Da Vinci robotic system.
